programme.title: Predict My Future: The Science of Us S1 - "The Early Years"
programme.desc: The Dunedin Longitudinal Study, begun in 1972 and continuing today. It looks at indicators in childhood behaviors identified by the study.

programme.title: Predict My Future: The Science of Us S1 - "When Teens Run Off The Rails"
programme.sub-title: When Teens Run Off The Rails
programme.desc: Based on the Dunedin Longitudinal Study results, this episode examines why most young adolescents engage in juvenile delinquency of some sort, minor and major.

programme.title: Predict My Future: The Science of Us S1 - "When Genes Mix With The Wrong Environment"
programme.sub-title: When Genes Mix With The Wrong Environment
programme.desc: The Dunedin Study has identified a fundamental developmental mechanism that completely rewrites the nature versus nurture argument

programme.title: Predict My Future: The Science of Us S1 - "Dirt Is Good, Dirt Poor Is Bad"
programme.sub-title: Dirt Is Good, Dirt Poor Is Bad
programme.desc: This episode of the series examines ways in which the results of the Dunedin study have contributed to a new understanding of early influences in a person's life

programme.title: Space Greed S1 - "Space As A Tax Haven"
programme.desc: For the ultra-wealthy, the best part of making money is avoiding taxes. Space could be an astronomical payday, but will all that profit slip by tax free?

programme.title: Space Greed S1 - "Traveling So Fast Time Slows Down"
programme.sub-title: Traveling So Fast Time Slows Down
programme.desc: When we start thinking about traveling at speeds close to the speed of light, our perception of time’s passing starts to get pretty mind-bending.

programme.title: Space Greed S1 - "Space & Shelter"
programme.desc: Resources are tight in space. Everything that goes up there has mass and therefore a cost.

programme.title: Space Greed S1 - "World Wide Wifi"
programme.desc: How will “world wide wifi” change the world again?

programme.title: Power & S3 - "Bokator – Tharot Sam"
programme.desc: Tharoth Sam, 26, is the first female fighter in Cambodian Bokator. She is also an MMA fighter and became a movie star starring in the big screen blockbuster, Jailbreak.

programme.title: Power & S3 - "Yabusame - Michael No"
programme.desc: Australian Michael No, who lives and works in Japan, trains at a 900 year old Yabusame school and performs traditional horseback archery during a shinto ritual.

programme.title: Power & S3 - "MMA Ballet – George Birkadze"
programme.desc: George Birkadze from Tblisi, Georgia, practices and teaches Mixed Martial Arts but is also a world famous ballet dancer, instructor and choreographer in based in Boston, U.S.A.

programme.title: The New Frontier S1 - "From There To Here"
programme.desc: The first phase of this journey is complete, now commences the second, with robotics, advanced technologies and sheer daring we are now going where before we only dreamt.

programme.title: The New Frontier S1 - "Return To The Moon"
programme.desc: Few have walked on the moon's surface, though her allure remains strong, once again we are glancing her way with renewed interest and with a view to return very soon.

programme.title: The New Frontier S1 - "The Inner Worlds"
programme.desc: Venus the first and brightest star in the evening sky, and Mercury fleeting across the solar disk. As we begin to take a closer look at our companions they are posing more questions than answers.

programme.title: The New Frontier S1 - "Next Stop Mars"
programme.desc: It has fired our imaginations for millennia, Mars, the God of War and the source of Man's science fictional demise. It is the only other place in our solar system than Man might one day call home.

programme.title: Xploration Outer Space S2 - "Building and Testing Rockets"
programme.desc: Join Emily Calandrelli as she tours a 1 million square foot facility in Alabama that is manufacturing some of the world’s most powerful rockets.

programme.title: Xploration Outer Space S2 - "Future of Space Exploration"
programme.desc: Join host Emily Calandrelli as she meets up with the world’s leading experts and explores how we will travel through space in the future.

programme.title: Xploration Outer Space S2 - "Extreme Solar System"
programme.desc: Join host Emily Calandrelli as she explores the most inhospitable and extreme places in our own solar system.

programme.title: Xploration Outer Space S2 - "Killer Debris from Space"
programme.desc: Join host Emily Calandrelli as she explores what exactly this "space junk" is and how we track and manage all of the stuff hurtling around our planet.

programme.title: Space Greed S1 - "Strange Space Recipes"
programme.desc: Survival anywhere requires that we adapt to our surroundings but how will humans adapt to survive in space?

programme.title: The New Frontier S1 - "The Planet Makers"
programme.desc: From the beginnings of our Solar System four and half billion years ago there remains tantalizing clues to its evolution; remnent debris: asteroids and comets. Now within our grasp these rocks of ice and dust are ready to give up their secrets.

programme.title: The New Frontier S1 - "The Ice Giants"
programme.desc: Beyond the asteroid belt lay the ice giants, some can be seen with the naked eye, others only glimpsed once by a passing probe. We are again sending cameras to the edge of the solar system giving us new insights into the evolution of our worlds.

programme.title: The New Frontier S1 - "The Moons of Olympus"
programme.desc: These are the the Moon's of the gas giants. Each a unique and mysterious world of its own. All are worthy of much more scrutiny.

programme.title: The New Frontier S1 - "The Sun"
programme.desc: We study our Sun closely, and like a Rosetta stone it can reveal the secrets of all the other stars above.

programme.title: Xploration Outer Space S2 - "Solving Mars"
programme.desc: Join host Emily Calandrelli as she examines what obstacles we need to overcome to put the first human on Mars.

programme.title: Xploration Outer Space S2 - "Men on The Moon"
programme.desc: In this episode, host Emily Calandrelli takes viewers back in time to the moment the historic Apollo program changed our world forever by landing a man on the moon.

programme.title: Xploration Outer Space S2 - "Astronaut Health"
programme.desc: Join host Emily Calandrelli as she trains and eats like an astronaut and learns about the dangers and challenges astronauts face when they travel outside our planet.

programme.title: Xploration Outer Space S2 - "Student Astronaut Contest"
programme.desc: Join Emily as she gets to know the winner and together, they prepare for space.

programme.title: Space Greed S1 - "Declaring Martian Law"
programme.desc: Space is home to crucial resources, important discoveries, and big potential profit.

programme.title: Space Greed S1 - "Sol Ownership: Can A Corporation Own The Sun?"
programme.sub-title: Sol Ownership: Can A Corporation Own The Sun?
programme.desc: Human needs have always created opportunities for human greed. And energy might be the most crucial need of all. Could we end up paying a subscription fee for sunlight?

programme.title: Space Greed S1 - "Terraforming: Can We Build A Planet B?"
programme.sub-title: Terraforming: Can We Build A Planet B?
programme.desc: Once we’ve managed to get a handle on building structures to help us live on the harsh, dangerous surfaces of other celestial bodies -- why stop there?

programme.title: Space Greed S1 - "Carbon Costs: Is Space Exploration Even Worth It?"
programme.sub-title: Carbon Costs: Is Space Exploration Even Worth It?
programme.desc: Each rocket that gets fired off has an impact on the atmosphere. Will Earth be able to survive hundreds, or even thousands, of fuel-burning rocket launches every year.

programme.title: Space Greed S1 - "Looting The Moon For Trillions of Dollars"
programme.sub-title: Looting The Moon For Trillions of Dollars
programme.desc: With NASA planning to make a manned return trip to the moon by 2024, how long until some giant corporation turns moon dust into a cosmic-sized payday?

programme.title: The New Frontier S1 - "Exo Planets"
programme.desc: As scientists and astronomers peer closer at nearby stars with ever more fidelity they are discovering planets; exo planets, worlds outside our own solar system.

programme.title: The New Frontier S1 - "Edge of the Universe"
programme.desc: What we see in the night sky is only a small percentage of the contents of the Universe, most is dark matter and dark energy we know it exists; however its nature eludes us for the moment.

programme.title: Breakthrough S1 - "Drones in Space: Mars to Titan"
programme.sub-title: Drones in Space: Mars to Titan
programme.desc: Droves have already conquered Earth, and now they're heading out into the solar system. The Mars Helicopter, Ingenuity is proving to be successful and will pave the way for Dragonfly, a future daring mission to Titan.

programme.title: Breakthrough S1 - "First Human Link"
programme.desc: 65 million years ago, an immense space rock slammed into Earth, creating the equivalent of nuclear winter, killing all of the dinosaurs.

programme.title: Breakthrough S1 - "Super Spider Silk"
programme.desc: From their unique predatory behaviors to the web masterpieces they weave, science is revealing big breakthroughs about spiders and their super strong and flexible silks.

programme.title: Breakthrough S1 - "Secrets of a Dog's Nose"
programme.desc: A dog's sense of smell can do amazing things. Dog can help humans sniff out all kinds of things that improve our lives, explosives, missing persons, illegal drugs. Now the latest research is revealing that dogs can detect disease, even cancer.

programme.title: The Lightbulb Moment S1 - "VANILLA"
programme.desc: In 1841 on the small island of Réunion, a 12-year-old slave did something no one had done before; artificially pollinate the vanilla plant. The vanilla bean took the world by storm, sparking the artificial flavor revolution and changing how we eat.

programme.title: The Lightbulb Moment S1 - "WIFI"
programme.desc: Actress Hedy Lamarr, “the world's most beautiful woman,” had a knack for inventing. During WWII, in an effort to help the Allies, she devised a technology designed to intercept Axis communications – and created the foundation of wireless internet.

programme.title: The Lightbulb Moment S1 - "STREAMING"
programme.desc: The early days of online video were plagued by low resolution and unbearable buffering times. But one day that all changed. In the late 90s, a breakthrough technology revolutionized streaming video, setting the foundation for the era of Netflix.

programme.title: The Lightbulb Moment S1 - "INTERSTATE"
programme.desc: Dwight Eisenhower’s interstate highway system was the biggest infrastructure project of its time, a bold plan to connect all corners of America and boost the economy. So how did it end up deepening the divide between rich and poor?

programme.title: The Re-Inventors S2 - "Fire Fighting"
programme.desc: It's literally a baptism by fire for two old flame-fighting patents. Will they pass the test or go up in smoke?

programme.title: The Re-Inventors S2 - "Double-Barreled Cannon"
programme.desc: Today we will resurrect a cannon used in the American Civil War.

programme.title: The Re-Inventors S3 - "Davis Life Pod"
programme.desc: Today we will try an invention that can save lives at sea.

programme.title: The Re-Inventors S3 - "Syrian Torpedo"
programme.desc: Today we will see what happens when you combine traditional blacksmithing, gunpowder and water.

programme.title: Proof of Concept S1 - "Conceiving Consciousness"
programme.desc: Simone Giertz, Reggie Watts, & Naomi Fitter, join Dianna for an exploration of what consciousness is & whether it can ever be understood. Also, a robot tells jokes.

programme.title: Proof of Concept S1 - "Randomness & Probability"
programme.desc: Comedian Maz Jobrani & Blackjack legend Mike Aponte play the odds, meanwhile, Dianna finds order in chaos, and just maybe hacks the stock market.

programme.title: Proof of Concept S1 - "Truth & Logical Paradox"
programme.desc: Dianna dives through the looking glass in this paradoxical exploration of truth itself, where the left could be right, & right might be wrong. w/ guest Zach Pincince.

programme.title: Proof of Concept S1 - "The Infinite"
programme.desc: Kyle Hill & Eugenia Cheng join the show to prove there is more than one infinity, that infinity is hidden all around us, & that we might actually be infinite ourselves.

programme.title: Xploration Awesome Planet S6 - "The Ocean’s Apex"
programme.desc: In this episode, we observe two of the ocean’s apex predators in the wild.

programme.title: InWonder: Documentary
InWonder: Documentary
InWonder: Documentary
InWonder: Documentary
